fields.notes: Custom endpoints stay gateway-only until a curated product profile exists.
MiniMax Anthropic-compatible endpoint supports the Claude lane; verified with the current MiniMax-M3 model.
MiniMax OpenAI-compatible endpoint supports the Responses wire required by the Codex sidecar.
Z.AI Anthropic-compatible endpoint supports the Claude lane; Z.AI OpenAI-compatible endpoints remain gateway-only because they are chat-completions only.
Z.AI OpenAI-compatible coding endpoint is chat-completions only; do not route it through the Codex sidecar.
Z.AI OpenAI-compatible general endpoint is chat-completions only; do not route it through the Codex sidecar.
